title: The Allies Regroup
description: Pages 16–16 focus on the allies regroup, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Tontatta, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as kanjuro's drawings help the fighters climb the plateau, turning the absurd rescue into a practical route toward the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: If they're hiding mansherry, I can't think of anywhere else they'd do it other than the "Royal Palace."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Viola, use your ability and try searching every last nook and cranny.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That needs that power more than anyone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I want to go home to green bit...

summary: The Allies Regroup develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Tontatta, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
